mapper.insert: insert into work_order_satisfaction(order_no, score, score_label, comment, evaluator_username, evaluator_display_name, evaluated_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{score}, #{scoreLabel}, #{comment}, #{evaluatorUsername}, #{evaluatorDisplayName}, #{evaluatedAt})
mapper.update: update work_order_satisfaction set score = #{score}, score_label = #{scoreLabel}, comment = #{comment}, evaluator_username = #{evaluatorUsername}, evaluator_display_name = #{evaluatorDisplayName}, evaluated_at = #{evaluatedAt} where order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: select id, order_no, score, score_label, comment, evaluator_username, evaluator_display_name, evaluated_at from work_order_satisfaction where order_no = #{orderNo}
select id, order_no, score, score_label, comment, evaluator_username, evaluator_display_name, evaluated_at from work_order_satisfaction order by evaluated_at desc
